name: Quest Patent Research Corporation
summary: Quest Patent Research Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, operates as an intellectual property asset management company in the United States. The company operates in two segments, Intellectual Property Licensing and Licensed Packaging Sales. It engages in the development, acquisition, licensing, and enforcement of intellectual property rights. The company owns, controls, and manages ten intellectual property portfolios, which primarily consist of patent rights. Quest Patent Research Corporation was incorporated in 1986 and is based in Rye, New York.
